description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light-colored wood or composite paneling and large glass windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch and a wide overhang, as well as a combination of floor-to-ceiling and standard windows. The rear and side elevations display a more utilitarian arrangement of windows, with some asymmetry in their placement. The house appears to have multiple rooms on each floor, visible through the open plan and interior partitions. The overall aesthetic is clean, minimalistic, and functional, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of wood paneling and glass. The design is boxy and minimalistic, with a prominent covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, large windows, and a mix of wood and glass surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, vertical window arrangement, and the extended side wall with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large garage-style doors or windows and a more utilitarian window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the flat roof, and the continuation of the wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide covered porch, overhang, and large glass door
